examples: Research has shown that isolating ourselves from others might result in depression.
By isolating organisms completely from external periodic cues, biologists learned that organisms have internal clocks.
Our anxieties can also be controlled by isolating thoughts, feelings and memories.
On Sunday, crowds of protesters blocked main roads, isolating Dhaka from other parts of the country.
